howSteps.title: Get Consultation
howSteps.text: Track progress and stay updated until treatment is completed.

faqItems.q: How do I book a doctor?
faqItems.a: Go to Doctors, open a doctor detail page, choose date/time slot, and confirm booking.
Yes, listed doctors are verified before they become available for patient bookings.

faqItems.q: Can I pay online for appointments?
faqItems.a: Yes, Stripe checkout is integrated for secure online appointment payments.

faqItems.q: Can I update my profile details anytime?
faqItems.a: Yes, the dashboard includes profile sections where you can edit your details anytime.

testimonials.name: Ali Raza
testimonials.content: Perscripto made booking doctor appointments very easy. Doctors are punctual and consultations are professional.

testimonials.name: Fatima Ahmed
testimonials.content: I loved the WhatsApp notifications. I get reminders for every appointment booking, which is very helpful.

testimonials.name: Usman Khan
testimonials.content: The interface is simple and user-friendly. I can easily book doctors for my medical consultations.

testimonials.name: Ayesha Malik
testimonials.content: Seeing the security features gave me confidence that my personal information is safe.

testimonials.name: Hassan Ali
testimonials.content: The online booking system is very fast and there is a wide selection of doctors.

about.heroLead: Perscripto is an innovative online healthcare platform designed to simplify how people find trusted doctors. We bridge the gap between patients and medical professionals with technology.
about.journeyP1: In today’s fast-paced world, finding the right doctor and booking a consultation can often be time-consuming and stressful. Perscripto aims to eliminate these challenges by providing a seamless, reliable, and user-friendly solution for patients and doctors.
about.journeyP2: Our platform allows patients to easily search for qualified doctors, explore specializations, view availability, and book appointments in just a few clicks. Whether it is a routine check-up or specialist consultation, Perscripto keeps quality healthcare within your reach.
about.journeyP3: We are committed to maintaining high standards of quality and trust. Every doctor on our platform goes through a verification process to ensure patients receive reliable care from experienced and certified professionals.
about.visionText: Our vision is to become a trusted digital healthcare partner by making qualified doctors accessible to everyone, anytime and anywhere.
about.missionText: Our mission is to improve patient experience by providing a smart, reliable, and efficient appointment system that connects people with the right doctors without delay.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to book your first appointment?
offers: Easy and quick online doctor booking
Access to verified and experienced doctors
Multiple service categories in one platform
